metadata.title: Local Authority Notes
metadata.notes: Stores local review guidance. Metzudah may be used as final human review authority outside runtime, but this app does not scrape or call external sources.

notes.detail: Quiz generation must use stored local JSON data only.
Context translations can be revised after human review; runtime reads approved local records.
This starter seed intentionally covers only Bereishis 1:1 through Bereishis 1:3.
